text: I prefer PR reviews that start with correctness risks before style comments.
The user prefers release docs that avoid marketing language and state measured evidence first.
사용자는 진행 상황을 길게 설명하기보다 검증 결과와 다음 작업을 바로 말하는 방식을 선호한다.
When a local provider works, the user prefers pivoting to that route instead of blocking on a cloud default.
The user wants small local models to be proven useful by scenario gates, not positioned with generic AI claims.
사용자는 새 실험을 시작할 때 긴 설계보다 바로 재현 가능한 명령과 기준선을 원한다.
For AideMemo positioning, the user prefers an agent-friendly SDK memory story over a generic note app pitch.
The user dislikes overclaiming release readiness when the benchmark evidence is still caveated.
The user prefers commits only after executable checks have passed.
사용자는 모델 적합성 논의보다 실제 smoke 결과를 먼저 보고 싶어 한다.
The user prefers final summaries that call out caveats instead of hiding weak assumptions.
The user wants evidence-backed progress over broad brainstorming when the repository can be tested locally.
We decided to keep SQLite as the default AideMemo store and leave redb optional.
We decided to expose LFM semantic search through --auto instead of making every CLI search hybrid by default.
We decided that the fact-type LoRA adapter should run as a shadow classifier before it can promote writes.
검색 자동 하이브리드는 데몬이 warm 상태일 때만 기본 옵션 후보로 보기로 했다.
The release gate will keep docs-feature-gate in the local preflight path.
For batch capture, we chose aidememo_fact_add_many so fsync is paid once per batch.
We decided to keep ColBERT as a warmed sidecar until AideMemo has a native multi-vector index.
합성 데이터로 학습한 어댑터는 실제 캡처 코퍼스 평가 전까지 자동 저장에 쓰지 않기로 했다.
We chose review-before-merge for branch memory segments rather than importing every cloud-agent branch automatically.
We decided that shared-store MCP installs should include AIDEMEMO_SOURCE_ID by default.
LFM 텍스트 모델은 라우터가 아니라 fact_type 힌트 실험에 배치하기로 했다.
We decided to pair vector-rebuild --current-only with consolidation when shrinking the semantic index.
We learned that MLX model execution fails in the sandbox unless the process can access Apple Metal.
Safe-mode LFM embedding loading returned identical vectors, so vector shape alone is not valid evidence.
The daemon prewarm test showed that startup should pay the model load, not the first user query.
한국어 Redis 질의는 BM25 후보가 비어 dense first-stage가 필요한 사례라는 걸 확인했다.
The Docusaurus build can pass while rendered navigation is broken, so docs-site-e2e must inspect the built site.
ColBERT improved head ranking only when the right fact was already present in the candidate set.
240회 LoRA smoke는 fact_type 분류가 학습으로 실제 개선될 수 있다는 신호를 줬다.
The workflow trigger scenarios showed that source_id scoping must be checked for beta leakage.
The release dry-run taught us to keep unpublished package install instructions out of public docs.
LoRA 평가에서 pattern 타입은 convention과 claim으로 자주 섞이는 약점이 남았다.
Pending review is a safer buffer than silently committing ambiguous extracted facts.
A sandbox-corrupted benchmark with Operation not permitted should be rejected as non-evidence.
Do not enable trust_remote_code for Hugging Face models until the repository code is audited.
Never run git reset --hard in this workspace unless the user explicitly requests that destructive operation.
Avoid using a synthetic-only LoRA adapter to automatically write fact_type values into durable memory.
샌드박스 권한 오류가 난 벤치마크 결과를 성능 근거로 쓰면 안 된다.
Do not trust a JSON-generation eval as proof that the model can classify the closed fact_type labels.
Avoid direct capture mode for uncertain hook output; queue it for pending review instead.
Do not make search.auto_hybrid the global fresh-install default while cold model load still changes latency.
사용자가 만든 dirty worktree 변경을 임의로 되돌리면 안 된다.
Do not treat ColBERT like a normal HNSW embedding swap because it requires per-token vectors.
Never claim release readiness when the package registry state has not been verified.
cloud agent branch segment는 검토 없이 자동 merge하면 안 된다.
Do not run package downloads or Hugging Face probes without acknowledging network access requirements.
Always run docs-feature-gate after changing public CLI or MCP documentation.
House rule: use apply_patch for manual code edits in this repository.
장시간 모델 학습 중에는 30초마다 짧은 진행 상황을 공유한다.
Always set AIDEMEMO_SOURCE_ID when several agents share one memory store.
Convention: fact_type values stay within preference, decision, lesson, error, convention, pattern, claim, note, and question.
For shadow LoRA evaluation, always report baseline-correct harms as well as accuracy.
Keep Python and MLX dependencies out of aidememo-core; use a sidecar or hook layer for model experiments.
모델 성능 문서에는 먼저 수치와 실행 명령을 적고 해석은 그 뒤에 둔다.
When consolidating memory, protect preference, lesson, and error facts from aggressive semantic collapse.
Frontend work in this repo follows the convention that cards should not be nested inside other cards.
최종 답변에는 실행하지 못한 검증과 남은 리스크를 명시한다.
Agent prompts should lead with the four core AideMemo MCP tools before listing advanced tools.
The daemon pattern keeps mcp-serve warm so repeated CLI searches avoid process startup cost.
The pending queue uses JSONL so hooks can append candidate facts without opening the store.
A shared AideMemo store uses source_id as the tenant boundary between coding agents.
LFM 분류기는 core 내부가 아니라 sidecar 프로세스가 fact_type_hint를 반환하는 구조다.
ColBERT reranking represents each document with token vectors and scores candidates with MaxSim.
Auto-hybrid search runs a BM25 probe first and promotes to semantic retrieval when lexical confidence is weak.
The shadow loop collects agent-labelled facts, retrains the LoRA adapter offline, and compares it against deterministic inference.
branch push는 append-only segment를 만들고 branch merge가 그 segment를 idempotent하게 가져오는 구조다.
The agent SDK wraps workflow_start, context, query, and fact_add_many into a compact memory workflow.
AideMemo stores one semantic vector per fact in the HNSW sidecar for fast approximate search.
consolidate는 중복 fact를 supersede하고 vector-rebuild가 current fact만 다시 색인하는 흐름이다.
The docs feature gate scans command inventory, sidebar wiring, architecture tokens, and measurement coverage.
The 240-iteration fact-type LoRA smoke reached 0.84 accuracy on the 45-case holdout.
The deterministic strong-cue baseline scored 0.69 on the mixed-language fact_type fixture.
The 1.2B MLX LoRA smoke trained about 2.785M parameters across 8 layers.
confidence 0.8 이상인 240회 LoRA 평가 구간은 31개 중 31개가 정답이었다.
With semantic prewarm enabled, the first user --via --auto search call was about 14.9 ms.
The MLX ColBERT rerank smoke improved hit@1 from 0.57 to 0.86 on the synthetic fixture.
The MLX dense 4-bit run reached dense hit@1 1.00 on the local scenario fixture.
model2vec warm query latency was about 3 ms in the prior AideMemo measurements.
The SQLite facts table stores fact_type as a required text column.
The docs feature gate reported 42 CLI commands, 61 CLI subcommands, and 27 MCP tools covered.
합성 LoRA smoke 데이터셋은 train 576개와 valid 144개로 생성됐다.
The fact_type corpus uses nine labels and stores language, scenario, source, and split metadata per row.
The MCP documentation was edited after the workflow-start examples were updated.
오늘 실험 메모에는 LoRA와 pending review 이야기가 같이 적혀 있다.
The fixture folder contains a seed corpus for coding-agent fact_type examples.
The release checklist mentions npm, PyPI, Hex, and docs build status.
The benchmark result file records storage backend probe output.
디버그 로그에는 mcp-serve 시작 메시지와 search trace가 남아 있었다.
The agent SDK package includes client and workflow helper modules.
The ColBERT rerank script output preserved the original AideMemo hit metadata.
상태 출력에는 adapter 경로와 validation loss가 함께 표시됐다.
The website package lock changed during the docs site work.
A future shadow collector can append reviewed fact_type rows to a JSONL file.
코퍼스 리뷰 파일에는 각 라벨별 train, valid, test 개수가 들어 있다.
How many labelled pending-review rows are enough before promoting the LoRA classifier?
confidence 기준을 0.8로 둘지 margin 조건을 추가할지 결정해야 할까?
Should implementation architecture facts be labelled pattern or claim when they lack an explicit uses-for phrase?
How often should the shadow LoRA adapter retrain from newly reviewed agent facts?
Can the fact_type sidecar keep the 1.2B model warm without slowing normal fact_add calls?
사용자가 fact_type을 입력하지 않았을 때 힌트만 보여줄지 자동 적용할지 어떻게 정할까?
Should the corpus stay balanced by label or reflect the natural note-heavy distribution of real captures?
Would a small encoder classifier beat a 1.2B LoRA sidecar on latency and precision?
한국어 fact_type 예제가 부족하면 LoRA가 영어 cue에만 과적합되지 않을까?
Should pending entries store both agent-provided fact_type and shadow model predictions for later audit?
Should a tuned fact_type sidecar be enabled by default only when a warm daemon is running?
측정값이 들어간 문장은 claim으로 볼지 note로 볼지 기준을 더 세워야 할까?
